Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add patient-centric dashboard, onboarding role flow, and community features

- Full dashboard redesign: orbital hub layout, 3-column on desktop, drawer nav
- Onboarding: role screen \(patient/guardian\), infers patient name from documents
- Patient name used throughout app; greeting uses the logged-in user's own name
- Community: filter posts by condition keywords, local communities via Claude AI
- Overview page renamed to "[Name]'s Story" using patient name from context
- Profile page: role/patient name section, save error handling, location field
- PoppyProvider: single source of truth for displayName and greetingName
- lib/profile-names.ts: getDisplayName / getGreetingName helpers
- Header: patient-focused name resolved server-side from DB
- SQL migrations: setup-profile-columns.sql ensures all profile columns exist
- Dashboard copy: "Where your care comes together"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
